title: cynoglossum polycarpum
intro: Cynoglossum polycarpum, also known as Chinese forget-me-not or two-fruit forked tongue, is a plant species belonging to the borage family that is native to Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Cynoglossum polycarpum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal properties, which are also used in modern herbal preparations, such as capsules and tinctures.
